title: HyperSonic
description: This is the FASTEST performance modpack for fabric. Straight up, this is the modpack you need to try.
body:
# TURN OFF V-SYNC 
*unless it flickers/tears

This modpack is hella fast. It consists of various performance and optimization mods that tremendously boost FPS and loading speeds. You HAVE to try this.



Neither are these mods my own, nor am I affiliated with them.
